item.title: Executive Order on Continuation of the Federal Emergency Management Agency Review Council
item.description: This executive order directs the continuation of the Federal Emergency Management Agency Review Council under the authority granted to the President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States. The order operates in accordance with chapter 10 of title 5, United States Code, commonly known as the Federal Advisory Committee Act, which establishes procedures and requirements for federal advisory committees. The order extends the establishment and operation of the FEMA Review Council to continue its advisory functions. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Proclamation Recognizing Greek Independence Day 2026
item.description: Presidential proclamation designating March 25, 2026 as Greek Independence Day, a day of national observance commemorating Greek independence and recognizing historical connections between Greek and American democratic traditions and values. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Proclamation Designating National Agriculture Day 2026
item.description: A presidential proclamation that establishes recognition of National Agriculture Day in 2026. The proclamation acknowledges the historical and ongoing contributions of farmers, ranchers, and agricultural producers to the United States economy and food supply. The document honors the agricultural community and their role in sustaining American communities and resources across the nation's history. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Executive Order on the Army-Navy Game
item.description: A presidential executive order addressing matters related to the Army-Navy Game, a collegiate football competition traditionally played annually between the United States Military Academy and the United States Naval Academy. The order invokes presidential authority under the Constitution and federal law to establish policy or take action concerning this sporting event, citing its historical significance spanning over a century and its cultural status within American tradition. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Executive Order on Establishing a Task Force to Address Fraud in Federal Benefit Programs
item.description: This executive order establishes a task force to examine fraud, waste, and improper payments within federal benefit programs administered by states, including housing assistance, food assistance, medical care, and cash assistance programs funded by federal taxpayers. The order directs relevant agencies to coordinate efforts in identifying, investigating, and reducing fraudulent activities and improper benefit distributions across these federally funded programs. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.
